title: Create: Portable Packaging
description: A Create addon that allows players to package by their hands.
body:
A Create addon that allows players to package by their hands.

**An item: Portable Packager** is added. 

Right-click to use it will open a GUI. Players can add up to 9 stacks of items from their inventory & hotbar to the packager. 

Press the button will give a package that contains the given items to the player. 

The address of the package can be set.
